source_pr.title: executor: trace the memory usage of Selection executors
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Trace the memory usage of Selection executors and display the result in `Explain Analyze`.
Wait for #13914.

### What is changed and how it works?
Introduce a `memtracker` into `SelectionExec` and use it to trace the memory usage.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: s.checkMemoryInfo(c, tk, "explain analyze select * from t order by v", false) (executor/explain_test.go)
failure_signature: s.checkMemoryInfo(c, tk, "explain analyze select * from t order by v", false) (executor/explain_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds memory tracking for Selection executors and updates explain-analyze memory tests. It does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix that maps to a specific root cause category.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: s.checkMemoryInfo(c, tk, "explain analyze select * from t order by v", false) (executor/explain_test.go)
